title: Export Controls Overview & Conflicts of Interest — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PowerPoint slide deck from the 2023-04-12 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Export Controls Overview & Conflicts of Interest: Recognition and Management'. Presented by Dr. Edet Isuk, PhD. Covers U.S. export control regulations as they apply to research (ITAR, EAR, OFAC) and the recognition and management of Conflicts of Interest at MSU. Companion Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/Nalj0YxkqxV4Fz9sNKLAakK2Gy9YMeAnMxKee_N3DI4_-swGGIKptljp77EF_dK5.-a43y717O-jY_wtR
